run_summary.summary: Three deals landing on the board today: (1) Wise Block — Iris from Make Wonder INC followed up for the 4th time this morning (Apr 28), their Apr 25–30 launch window is down to 2 days. Previous run only flagged this as a suggestion but per the playbook it should be a card — creating it now at Negotiation so it's visible. Cash comp + free product + Key Partner status for 1 YouTube/Instagram video. (2) Shabebe — Liz sent an outbound pitch Apr 27 proposing a backyard firepit patio collab featuring their Rock Glue. No reply yet, creating card at Negotiation/waiting on brand. (3) Black Diamond Coatings — same pitch concept sent same day to Lauren Jankauskas, featuring their Mulch Glue for the DIY patio project. No reply yet either. ZAPAKA insertion order skipped — affiliate/commission-only (8%), no upfront fee. Whisker ACH confirmation (Liz replied Apr 27) already captured in the previous run's card.

suggestions.message: Today or tomorrow is the last window — Iris has followed up 4 times since Apr 23 and their launch deadline is Apr 25–30. The offer is cash comp + free building block set + Key Partner status for 1 YouTube/Instagram video. If there's any interest, the rate quote needs to go out by tomorrow Apr 29 at the latest.
Liz pitched them Apr 27 for the backyard firepit patio collab featuring Rock Glue — card is on the board now. Follow-up around Apr 30 if no response.
Same firepit concept pitched to Lauren Jankauskas Apr 27 — card is on the board. Follow-up around Apr 30 if no response.

deals.next_action: Reply to Iris with rate quote — launch window closes Apr 30
deals.notes:
[Apr 28]: Iris followed up a 4th time asking for Liz's quotation for the Wise Block Botanical Series. Launch window closes Apr 30.
[Apr 23]: Original outreach from Iris at Make Wonder INC (official Wise Block partner agency under Alpha Group). Offering cash compensation (competitive collaboration fee) + 1 free building block set + Key Partner status for 1 YouTube/Instagram Video. Botanical Series = Eastern-themed building block sets (Sakura Zen, Pine Breath, Maple Whisper, Blossom Harmony). Sample delivery: 3–5 days after confirmation. Launch deadline: before April 25–30.

deals.next_action: Follow up with Lauren if no response by Apr 30
deals.notes: [Apr 27]: Liz sent outbound pitch to Lauren at Shabebe proposing a backyard firepit patio makeover collab. Concept: raised patio with large pavers + pea gravel, showcasing Shabebe's Rock Glue and hardscape products for a DIY family-friendly outdoor space. Liz attached media kit and CC'd Kenny.

deals.next_action: Follow up with Lauren if no response by Apr 30
deals.notes: [Apr 27]: Liz sent outbound pitch to Lauren Jankauskas at Black Diamond Coatings proposing a backyard firepit patio makeover collab. Same DIY patio project concept as Shabebe pitch, featuring their Mulch Glue and hardscape products. Liz attached media kit and CC'd Kenny.
